name: visualize-from-url
query: Visualize this article as a one-pager infographic: https://example.com/some-blog-post
expected_behavior: Uses WebFetch to crawl the URL and extract real content (no Lorem ipsum)
Picks one-pager / infographic type from the Visualization Types table
Starts from references/skeleton.md and adds extracted content into the YOUR CONTENT HERE block
Single .html file written to ~/Downloads/ with content drawn from the URL, not placeholders
_notes: Edge case: external content fetch + content-faithful visualization. Tests that the skill uses real source material, not generated filler.
